# Goals for 2026

## Q1 Objectives
- Launch side project by March
- Save $10,000 emergency fund
- Complete AWS certification course

## Q2 Targets
- Plan for career transition
- Start investing regularly

## Reflections

I feel like I've been stuck in a rut lately. I think the problem is that I haven't been disciplined enough with my time. I realized that my biggest weakness is starting things but not finishing them. I learned from last year that I need more structure.

Why do I keep procrastinating on the important stuff? Because I'm afraid of failure, I think. I feel overwhelmed when I look at the big picture but I've learned to break things down into smaller steps.

I think I need to be more patient with myself. I realized that growth takes time and I can't rush everything. But sometimes I feel frustrated because progress is slow.

## Daily Habits
- Morning workout
- 2 hours deep work
- Evening journaling

This is a longer note with plenty of structure. I need to keep writing and reflecting. I feel that journaling helps me think more clearly about my goals and objectives for each quarter.
